meta.what: A real, ship-config SNHP negotiation at a boba shop: your agent trades on the things you don't care about (when you pick up, which topping, how many) for a better price — never above the menu.
meta.guarantee: Every quote is discount-only and floored: you never pay above the menu, and the shop never earns below its menu margin — even if every customer games it.

headline.note: vs a strong, profit-optimal menu (not a strawman), 30 paired days. Worst case (everyone lies, no attestation) = exactly the menu.

timing.shop: moved you off the 3pm crush — freed a peak slot to sell to someone in a hurry

group.shop: one prep run for the whole order — real batch economies
